sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104554" key="trapezoloixo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾰπεζο-λοιχός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n104554.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">table-licker, parasite,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; so <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τραπεζολείκτης</orth> as a pr. n., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.45</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
